code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{BASE_URL}from"../../api";import"./AdminEnquiries.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminEnquiries=()=>{const[enquiries,setEnquiries]=useState([]);const[clearing,setClearing]=useState(false);const fetchEnquiries=()=>{fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/enquiries")).then(r=>r.json()).then(setEnquiries).catch(console.error);};useEffect(()=>{fetchEnquiries();},[]);const clearEnquiries=async()=>{const confirmed=window.confirm("Are you sure you want to clear all enquiry history?
